integration_notes: The script will continue to use the established `CifarLoader` and `BatchNorm` classes, ensuring compatibility with the pre-existing environment. We will explicitly prioritize JIT compilation and fused kernels.
performance_task: Leverage `torch.compile` more effectively, optimize the data loader (pre-allocate pinned memory or move entirely to GPU), and simplify the training loop to minimize Python overhead during critical path execution.
reliability_task: Ensure the evaluation loop (TTA) remains deterministic and matches the exact evaluation logic used in previous successful trials to prevent accuracy regression.
round_goal: Further optimize inference and training throughput while maintaining the 94% accuracy threshold.
